subcodes.first_line: O thou who art kindled with the fire of God's love! Like unto the birds of the meadowland of truth, thou dost warble melodies to the ears of them that are attuned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوقد بنار محبت الله چون طیور چمنستان حقیقت بنغمه و آواز ایند مسامع اهل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @chastisement and requital
